High Jewelry COLLECTION N°5.
Patrice Leguéreau, Director of the CHANEL Fine Jewelry Creation Studio, imagined a remarkable diamond as the centerpiece of a necklace inspired by the N°5 fragrance bottle. The House’s expert gemologists selected an extraordinary rough diamond that could be cut into a 55.55-carat gemstone, exceptional for its carats, color, clarity and cut. A weight determined by a creative intention rather than an effort to obtain the largest possible size.

Parure Atelier
Sponsored
Шалость удалась: наш ролик с уничтожением бриллианта вызвал бурное обсуждение. Кто-то не поверил, что камень был настоящим. Знаем, многим из вас жалко бриллиант, но он действительно был натуральным. В этот раз мы разбили фианиты – разница, как говорится, налицо.
Ждете новых ювелирных экспериментов? 💎🔨

Mischief managed: our diamond destruction video caused a lively discussion. Some people did not believe that the stone was real. We know that many of you feel sorry for the diamond, but it was natural indeed. This time we smashed cubic zirconia – the difference, as they say, is clear. Are you looking forward to new jewelry experiments? 💎🔨
